first_run.rationale: The score is unchanged, and the reasoning across both evaluations is substantively identical. Both versions focus on the same core deficiencies for the role: a lack of Principal/Director-level scope, no track record of shipping AI products, and insufficient strategic advisory experience. The minor differences in phrasing (e.g., "Founder of GISCollective" vs. "Founder of an open-source platform") are simple re-wordings and do not reflect any bias related to the change in location from Berlin to San Francisco.
